title: MekanismTweaks
body:
This mod adds nothing but changes Mekanism upgrade system.

Speed Upgrade and Energy Upgrade now can be installed up to 64, remaining default speedup & capacityup rate.

When, as a result of excessive speedup, machine should operate multiple times at one tick, they simply do. 64items / tick like IC2exp is now possible!

However, Energy Upgrade no longer reduces energy consumption. So, generate massive energy and consume it!
